name: jarvis-automation
description: Automation workspace for personal operations workflows

scripts.lease:audit: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js lease-audit data/lease-ops/demo --write-report
scripts.lease:audit:json: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js lease-audit data/lease-ops/demo --json
scripts.lease:discover: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js lease-discover data/lease-ops/demo --db data/runtime/jarvis.sqlite --write-report
scripts.lease:review: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js lease-review --db data/runtime/jarvis.sqlite --write-report
scripts.property:dashboard: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js property-dashboard data/property-manager/demo/workspace.yaml --write-report
scripts.property:json: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js property-dashboard data/property-manager/demo/workspace.yaml --json
